type.description: NGSI Entity type. It has to be TaskStatus

taskStart.description: Start time of the task, expressed as date-time, defined in the ISO 8601 standard

taskEnd.description: End time of the task, expressed as date-time, defined in the ISO 8601 standard

taskElapsedDuration.description: Total Elapsed time of the task from start time, defined in the ISO 8601 standard
